title: The Jammu and Kashmir (Extension of Laws) Act, 1956
full_text: The Jammu and Kashmir (Extension of Laws) Act, 1956 जम्मू-कश्मीर (विधि-विस्तारण) अधिनियम, 1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1956-62 Act Number: 62 Enactment Date: 1956-09-25 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Jammu and Kashmir (Extension of Laws) Act, 1956 Hindi Title: जम्मू-कश्मीर (विधि-विस्तारण) अधिनियम, 1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of certain laws to the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Jammu and Kashmir Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-11-1956 Notification: 1st November, 1956, vide notification No. S. R. O. 2327, dated 10th October, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3. Last Updated: 08-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Jammu and Kashmir (Extension of Laws) Act, 1956 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Extension and amendment of certain laws. Section 3. Construction of references to laws not in force in Jammu and Kashmir. Section 4. Construction of references to authorities where new authorities have been constituted. Section 5. Repeals and savings. Section 6. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
